changelog: Friend Request Restoration - Fixed blank screen issue in requests
Provider Alignment - Added user_id/friend_id aliases for proper data flow
UI Cleanup - Removed FutureBuilders for faster loading
Data Consistency - Enriched friendsStream with friend_id, friend_name, friend_username
Chat Avatars - Dynamic profile picture fetching for messages
Own message avatar now reacts to profile changes via context.watch
Integrated Mapbox Location Previews (No Google Maps links!)
Live GPS Accuracy Improvement (High Accuracy Fix)
Fresh Database Start (New account required for v1.0.16)
